title: Carne Asada Tacos
instructions: Marinate steak in citrus mixture for 4 hours.
Let rest, then slice against the grain.

reviews.text: Best tacos ever! Marinated for 24 hours instead of 4. Added a dash of cumin and squeeze of lime right before serving.
Great flavor! I topped with cotija cheese and a drizzle of sour cream. Next time will add more jalapenos.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
